title: xyris atrovirida
intro: Xyris atrovirida, also known as the yellow-eye grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Xyris atrovirida include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical applications.
